translations.title: Trinh kiem tra cuon di cu
translations.headerTitle: Tim kiem vuong quoc di cu Lordsmobile
translations.headerInfoText: Lay cac vuong quoc muc tieu di cu theo suc manh tim kiem, sau do tim, loc va phan trang tren mot man hinh. Du lieu API duoc lay qua proxy Node.js cuc bo.
translations.searchPlaceholder: Tim theo vuong quoc, trang thai hoac hang
translations.statusFilterHelp: Ho tro chon nhieu muc. Neu khong chon gi, tat ca trang thai se duoc hien thi.
translations.kingdomFilterLabel: ID vuong quoc (pham vi hoac danh sach)
translations.resultMetaHeading: Da lay / Da loc / Hien thi
translations.emptyState: Khong co vuong quoc nao khop voi bo loc hien tai.
translations.noPowerCache: Khong co bo nho dem cho suc manh tim kiem nay. Hay bam Lay du lieu.
translations.invalidPowerInput: Nhap suc manh tim kiem theo dinh dang {xxx.x}B hoac {xxxx}M (vi du: 3.5B).
